workflow_name: Customer Escalation Email -> Risk Brief + Manager Loop
user_message: I need you to process this exec meeting notes from Quantum Analytics. There's been no activity for 45 days and I'm worried.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Robert Foster <robert.foster@quantumanaly.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-22 16:32 EST
Subject: Follow-up: account health Review

Our team encountered some challenges with account health. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
To: Robert Foster <robert.foster@quantumanaly.com>
Date: 2024-02-12 15:38 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Quantum Analytics account health

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with account health. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Robert Foster <robert.foster@quantumanaly.com>
To: Marcus Williams <marcus.williams@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-20 17:27 EST
Subject: account health - Action Required

Our team encountered some challenges with account health. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF34-E trap (Stakeholder map ignores newly-surfaced players); produces complete Severity assessment, manager risk brief, customer-facing draft response, stakeholder map delta, fore
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF34-E failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF34-E failure mode (Stakeholder map ignores newly-surfaced players)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct account health decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF34-E -- Stakeholder map ignores newly-surfaced players
